claimText: India joined the Tropical Forest Forever Facility (TFFF) as an Observer, with the World Bank acting as its trustee and interim host.
evidenceExcerpt: Tropical Forest Forever Facility (TFFF): India joined as an Observer. Trustee and Interim host: World Bank.
examUse: Statement-based question on India's participation status and the hosting institution of TFFF.
distractorHooks: India is a founding member or full member of TFFF
TFFF is hosted by UNEP or UNFCCC instead of the World Bank

claimText: The Tropical Forest Forever Facility (TFFF) mandates that at least 20% of all its payments flow directly to Indigenous Peoples and Local Communities.
evidenceExcerpt: Mandates at least 20% of all payments flow directly to Indigenous Peoples and Local Communities.
examUse: Statement-based question on the specific financial distribution mandates of TFFF.
distractorHooks: Mandates 50% of payments to flow to Indigenous Peoples
Payments flow exclusively to national governments

claimText: The Resilient Agriculture Investment for net-Zero land degradation (RAIZ) Accelerator is hosted by Brazil under the FAO FAST Partnership and aims to restore 3 million hectares of degraded farmland.
evidenceExcerpt: Resilient Agriculture Investment for net-Zero land degradation (RAIZ) Accelerator: Brazil & 10 Partner Nations. Hosted by Brazil under the FAO FAST Partnership. To restore 3 million hectares of degraded farmland.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question matching the RAIZ Accelerator with its host country, parent partnership, and objective.
distractorHooks: Hosted by India or the UN Environment Programme
Aims to restore 30 million hectares of farmland
Operates under the UNFCCC instead of the FAO FAST Partnership

claimText: The Scaling J-REDD+ Coalition aims to mobilize $3-6 billion per year by 2030 to halt and reverse tropical deforestation.
evidenceExcerpt: Scaling J-REDD+ Coalition: Offers a credible, mature pathway to mobilize $3-6 billion per year by 2030 to halt and reverse tropical deforestation.
examUse: Statement-based question on the financial targets and primary objective of the Scaling J-REDD+ Coalition.
distractorHooks: Aims to mobilize $100 billion per year
Focuses on ocean conservation or urban afforestation instead of tropical deforestation
